items.raw_desc: Vízhőmérő Zopa 3in1 Szilikon hőmérő - Pingvin:The Zopa water thermometer combines three practical functions. It serves not only as a reliable water thermometer to check the ideal bath temperature, but also as a room thermometer and a soothing night light. It is made of soft, non-toxic silicone that is safe for children. It offers several lighting modes, including RGB breathing, RGB flashing, steady colour, and the ability to turn off. The coloured LED signalling shows the current temperature so you can tell at a glance whether the water is suitable for bathing. The thermometer is suitable for both water and children's rooms and is easy to operate with four buttons. Charging is via USB-C, with the 600 mAh battery offering a long battery life on a single charge. A handy feature is the automatic shut-off, which is activated after 1 minute out of the water or after 30 minutes in the water.
